sentences.target: Je mate la nouvelle série ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mat la nuvɛl seʁi sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Je mate la nouvelle série ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mat la nuvɛl seʁi sə swaʁ/
translations.en: I’m watching the new series tonight.
translations.es: Voy a ver la nueva serie esta noche.
translations.de: Ich schaue mir heute Abend die neue Serie an.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 새로운 시리즈를 볼 거야.
translations.ru: Я сегодня вечером буду смотреть новый сериал.
translations.pt: Vou assistir à nova série hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay tôi sẽ xem phim bộ mới.
translations.nl: Vanavond ga ik de nieuwe serie kijken.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері я дивитимуся новий серіал.
translations.hu: Ma este megnézem az új sorozatot.
translations.hi: मैं आज रात नई सीरीज़ देखूंगा।
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem będę oglądać nowy serial.
translations.el: Σήμερα το βράδυ θα δω τη νέα σειρά.
translations.nb: I kveld skal jeg se den nye serien.
translations.id: Malam ini aku akan nonton serial baru.
translations.sv: Ikväll ska jag titta på den nya serien.
translations.ro: Diseară mă uit la noul serial.
translations.cs: Dnes večer se podívám na nový seriál.
translations.da: I aften skal jeg se den nye serie.
translations.ja: 今夜は新しいシリーズを観る。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of 'mater' (colloquial: to watch/check out).
Definite article, feminine singular; agrees with 'série'.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular; agrees with 'série'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'mate'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' in a time expression.
Common noun, masculine; used adverbially in 'ce soir' to indicate time.

sentences.target: On va mater cette vidéo drôle.

translations.fr: On va mater cette vidéo drôle.
translations.en: We’re gonna watch this funny video.
translations.es: Vamos a ver este video divertido.
translations.de: Wir schauen uns dieses lustige Video an.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要看这个搞笑视频。
translations.pt: Vamos assistir a este vídeo engraçado.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לראות את הסרטון המצחיק הזה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ xem video hài này.
translations.nl: We gaan deze grappige video kijken.
translations.uk: Ми збираємося подивитися це смішне відео.
translations.el: Θα δούμε αυτό το αστείο βίντεο.
translations.nb: Vi skal se denne morsomme videoen.
translations.id: Kita akan nonton video lucu ini.
translations.sv: Vi ska titta på den här roliga videon.
translations.ro: O să ne uităm la acest videoclip amuzant.
translations.cs: Podíváme se na tohle vtipné video.
translations.da: Vi skal se denne sjove video.
translations.ja: この面白い動画を見よう。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular indefinite pronoun used colloquially for 'we' as subject.
Auxiliary 'aller' in present, 3rd person singular, forming futur proche.
Infinitive main verb complement of 'va' (colloquial: to watch/check out).
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'vidéo'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'mater'.
Attributive adjective; agrees in gender/number with 'vidéo' (feminine singular).

sentences.target: Ils matent la vitrine du magasin.

translations.fr: Ils matent la vitrine du magasin.
translations.en: They’re checking out the shop window.
translations.es: Están mirando el escaparate de la tienda.
translations.de: Sie schauen sich das Schaufenster des Ladens an.
translations.it: Stanno guardando la vetrina del negozio.
translations.yue: 佢哋喺度睇舖頭嘅櫥窗。
translations.pt: Eles estão olhando a vitrine da loja.
translations.he: הם מסתכלים על חלון הראווה של החנות.
translations.vi: Họ đang ngắm cửa sổ trưng bày của cửa hàng.
translations.nl: Ze bekijken de etalage van de winkel.
translations.hi: वे दुकान की विंडो डिस्प्ले देख रहे हैं।
translations.ja: 彼らは店のショーウィンドーを見ている。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun (masculine or mixed).
Present indicative, 3rd person plural of 'mater' (colloquial: to watch/check out).
Definite article, feminine singular; agrees with 'vitrine'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'matent'.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le'; preposition introducing the noun complement ('du magasin').
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: Elle mate les photos sur Insta.

translations.fr: Elle mate les photos sur Insta.
translations.en: She’s checking out photos on Insta.
translations.es: Ella está mirando fotos en Insta.
translations.de: Sie schaut sich Fotos auf Insta an.
translations.it: Lei sta guardando le foto su Insta.
translations.pt: Ela está vendo fotos no Insta.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang xem ảnh trên Insta.
translations.hu: Ő az Instán nézegeti a fotókat.
translations.hi: वह इंस्टा पर तस्वीरें देख रही है।
translations.nb: Hun ser på bilder på Insta.
translations.id: Dia sedang melihat foto di Insta.
translations.ro: Ea se uită la poze pe Insta.
translations.cs: Dívá se na fotky na Insta.
translations.da: Hun kigger på billeder på Insta.
translations.ja: 彼女はインスタで写真を見ている。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'mater' (colloquial: to watch/check out).
Definite article, plural; agrees with 'photos'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'mate'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Proper noun (platform name), object of the preposition 'sur'.
